articles.author: Nicholas Riccardi, Matt Brown
articles.title: Election loss for Hungarian Prime Minister Orbán has ripple effects for Trump, US conservatives - AP News
articles.description: The big election over the weekend was in a small European country nearly half a world away from Washington, but the defeat of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has significant reverberations in the United States. That’s because President Donald Trump and …
